claims.summary: RUN_PYTHON parsing must preserve quoted, multiline, comment, colon, equals, nested punctuation, and flag-like prompt content.
claims.disposition: verify the extracted parser and dense quote, comment, code-boundary, and malformed-input regressions

claims.summary: Script names must be sanitized so path-like prompt text cannot escape the experiment workspace.
claims.disposition: verify safe script-name normalization and traversal regression coverage

claims.summary: Parser hardening must not broaden RUN_PYTHON authority or collapse Recess and Focused policy boundaries.
claims.disposition: verify authority routing, facade compatibility, and distinct regime tests
